hero.title: Your Trusted Local Handyman
hero.subtitle: MAINTENANCE AND REPAIRS IN WICKENBURG, AZ
hero.description: With over 20 years of experience, we're neighbors and friends in this community. We offer repairs, maintenance, and small home updates at fair prices and quality work.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Repairs, maintenance, and small updates for your home or business — and many more services

bathroomRemodeling.title: Bathroom Updates & Repairs
bathroomRemodeling.description: We repair and update fixtures, tile, faucets, and finishes in your bathroom with careful attention to detail.

flooringTile.description: Repair and upkeep of flooring, tile work, and general flooring fixes.

doorsWindows.title: Doors & Windows
doorsWindows.description: Door and window installation, adjustments, and repairs to improve the safety and look of your property.

stuccoFences.title: Stucco & Fences
stuccoFences.description: Stucco and fence repair and upkeep to keep your property protected and looking good year-round.

safety.description: Insured handyman service, with strict safety protocols on every job.

serviceAreas.title: Service Areas
serviceAreas.subtitle: Serving Wickenburg and nearby communities
serviceAreas.description: We proudly serve Wickenburg and the surrounding area. For projects beyond 50 miles, give us a call to arrange travel costs. No job is too big or too small.

contactCTA.title: Have a Project in Mind?
contactCTA.description: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate. We'll take care of the rest.

footer.tagline: Built With Strength. Delivered With Pride.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for home repairs and maintenance in Wickenburg

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: With over 20 years of experience, Oscar Salazar and his family have been well known in the Wickenburg community as neighbors and friends. Today, they proudly continue serving the community through Gato Montes Construction, providing reliable handyman and home maintenance services, including bathroom updates and repairs, flooring and tile repair, door and window installation, stucco and fence repair, drywall, painting, and many other home improvement services.
story.paragraph2: We understand the challenges of maintaining a property in the Arizona desert and offer lasting solutions at fair prices. As your local handyman team, we proudly serve Wickenburg and the surrounding area, and are happy to travel beyond 50 miles by prior arrangement.
